title: RelBench rel-f1 Dataset Preparation for JRN Estimation
summary: Demonstrates the RelBench rel-f1 (Formula 1) relational database preparation pipeline for Join Reproduction Number (JRN) estimation. The notebook loads raw RelBench rel-f1 data including 9 tables, 13 foreign-key relationships, and 6 prediction tasks, then transforms each record type into a unified example format with input/output strings and metadata fields. The mini demo data JSON contains a curated subset of the rel-f1 dataset with table rows, FK join metadata entries, and prediction task samples from Stanford RelBench v2.1.1.
